summary.zh: 角色编辑器工作台,基于 Three.js 的多管线角色生成器。它把角色从概念到能动起来分成多条管线:像素角色四方向序列帧、Spine 骨骼拆件绑骨与动画、视频角色三视图→序列帧、技能 VFX 与打击感(挂点 / 受击白闪 / 伤害飘字)、八方向五动画的怪物生成。集成 AI 图像与视频生成,产出 manifest + portrait / turnaround / spritesheet,下游直接接入动画工作台。
summary.en: The character editor workbench — a Three.js multi-pipeline character generator. It splits a character from concept to motion across pipelines: 4-direction pixel sprite sheets, Spine rig binding + animation, video turnaround → frames, skill VFX with game-feel (hit flashes, damage numbers), and 8-direction / 5-animation monster generation. With AI image and video generation, it outputs a manifest + portrait / turnaround / spritesheet that feed straight into the Animation workbench.

body.zh: 像素角色四方向 · Spine 骨骼 · 视频角色 · 技能 VFX · 八方向怪物
body.en: 4-dir pixel · Spine rig · video character · skill VFX · 8-dir monsters

body.zh:
manifest + portrait / turnaround / spritesheet
下游接入动画工作台
body.en:
manifest + portrait / turnaround / spritesheet
feeds the Animation workbench

body.zh: 面板管理启用 → 打开「wb-character」或对话 /character
body.en: Enable in Admin → open 'wb-character' or type /character

notes.zh: 首版:多管线角色生成器
